scripts.setup:local: npm run db:api:setup && npm run db:api:test:setup
scripts.setup:dx: bash dx dev && npm run db:api:setup:dx && npm run db:api:test:setup:dx
scripts.dev: npm run setup:types && turbo run dev
scripts.prisma:api:generate:dx: bash dx shell api npm run prisma:generate
scripts.prisma:api:migrate:deploy:dx: bash dx shell api npm run prisma:migrate:deploy
scripts.prisma:api:migrate:dev:dx: bash dx shell api npm run prisma:migrate:dev
scripts.prisma:api:seed:dx: bash dx shell api npm run prisma:seed
scripts.prisma:api:studio:dx: bash dx shell api npm run prisma:studio
scripts.db:api:create: psql "postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/postgres" -tAc "SELECT 1 FROM pg_roles WHERE rolname='fintrack'" | grep -q 1 || psql "postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/postgres" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -c "CREATE USER fintrack WITH PASSWORD 'fintrack';" && psql "postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/postgres" -c "ALTER USER fintrack CREATEDB;" && psql "postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/postgres" -tAc "SELECT 1 FROM pg_database WHERE datname='fintrack'" | grep -q 1 || psql "postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/postgres" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -c "CREATE DATABASE fintrack OWNER fintrack;"
scripts.db:api:create:dx: bash dx shell postgres sh -lc "psql -U fintrack -d postgres -tAc \"SELECT 1 FROM pg_database WHERE datname='fintrack'\" | grep -q 1 || psql -U fintrack -d postgres -c \"CREATE DATABASE fintrack\""
scripts.db:api:setup: npm run db:api:create && npm run prisma:api:generate && npm run prisma:api:migrate:deploy && npm run prisma:api:seed
scripts.db:api:setup:dx: npm run db:api:create:dx && bash dx run prisma:api:generate:dx && bash dx run prisma:api:migrate:deploy:dx && bash dx run prisma:api:seed:dx
scripts.db:api:reset: npm run db:api:clean && npm run prisma:api:generate && npm run prisma:api:migrate:deploy && npm run prisma:api:seed
scripts.db:api:reset:dx: npm run db:api:clean:dx && bash dx run prisma:api:generate:dx && bash dx run prisma:api:migrate:deploy:dx && bash dx run prisma:api:seed:dx
scripts.db:api:test:create: psql "postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/postgres" -tAc "SELECT 1 FROM pg_roles WHERE rolname='fintrack'" | grep -q 1 || psql "postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/postgres" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -c "CREATE USER fintrack WITH PASSWORD 'fintrack';" && psql "postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/postgres" -c "ALTER USER fintrack CREATEDB;" && psql "postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/postgres" -tAc "SELECT 1 FROM pg_database WHERE datname='fintrack_test'" | grep -q 1 || psql "postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/postgres" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -c "CREATE DATABASE fintrack_test OWNER fintrack;"
scripts.db:api:test:create:dx: bash dx shell postgres sh -lc "psql -U fintrack -d postgres -tAc \"SELECT 1 FROM pg_database WHERE datname='fintrack_test'\" | grep -q 1 || psql -U fintrack -d postgres -c \"CREATE DATABASE fintrack_test\""
scripts.db:api:test:migrate:dx: bash dx shell api npm run prisma:migrate:deploy:test:dx
scripts.db:api:test:setup: npm run db:api:test:create && npm run db:api:test:migrate
scripts.db:api:test:setup:dx: npm run db:api:test:create:dx && npm run db:api:test:migrate:dx
scripts.db:api:test:reset: npm run db:api:clean:test && npm run db:api:test:create && npm run db:api:test:migrate
scripts.db:api:test:reset:dx: npm run db:api:clean:test:dx && npm run db:api:test:create:dx && npm run db:api:test:migrate:dx
scripts.db:api:drop: psql "postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/postgres" -c "SELECT pg_terminate_backend(pid) FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE datname='fintrack'" -c "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS fintrack;"
scripts.db:api:test:drop: psql "postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/postgres" -c "SELECT pg_terminate_backend(pid) FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE datname='fintrack_test'" -c "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS fintrack_test;"
scripts.db:api:drop:all: npm run db:api:drop && npm run db:api:test:drop && psql "postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/postgres" -c "DROP ROLE IF EXISTS fintrack;"
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:web
scripts.test:dx: bash dx shell api npm run test:dx && bash dx shell web npm run test
scripts.test:api:dx: bash dx shell api npm run test:dx
scripts.test:api:prod:dx: bash dx shell api npm run prod
scripts.test:web:dx: bash dx shell web npm run test
scripts.test:api:light:dx: bash dx shell api npm run test:light:dx
scripts.test:api:stress:dx: bash dx shell api npm run test:stress:dx
scripts.test:api:e2e:dx: bash dx shell api npm run test:e2e:dx
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint
scripts.fix: npm run format && npm run lint:fix
scripts.tidy: npm run fix && npm run check
